title: senecio bustillosianus
intro: Senecio bustillosianus is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae), native to Mexico, and is commonly known as Bustillos' ragwort. This plant contains sesquiterpene lactones, which have been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Senecio bustillosianus include its potential to treat various conditions such as arthritis, skin irritations, and infections, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and combat pathogens. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as an herbal tea or infusion, and its leaves and stems are sometimes used in folk medicine, although its safety and efficacy have not been extensively scientifically studied.
